title: Full Size Hot Glue Sticks Set(50 Pack), 150mm Long x 11mm Diameter Hot Glue Gun Sticks for DIY Craft Sticky Projects
features: 【50 Clear Glue Sticks Included】Comes with 50 pack clear glue sticks with standard 0.43" diameter and 6" length (11 x 150 mm) and is compatible with most full glue guns on the market

【All Temp&Longger Lenth】0.43 in diameter x 6 in length (11 x 150 mm) full size hot glue stick is compatible with high, low and dual temperature hot glue guns. Extended length design reduces the frequency of replacements during use, enhancing efficiency and saving time

【Fast Bonding&High Viscosity】Our hot melt glue sticks open and set in just 15–30 seconds, significantly speeding up your workflow. When the temperature reaches 160°C (320°F), the Viscosity achieves 17,000±1,000 mPa·s. They deliver stronger, more reliable bonds than most standard glue sticks. Good flexibility and luster, durability for daily gluing

【High Quality &Non-Toxic】Made of non-toxic high-quality materials to ensure that no harmful substances and odors are produced during operation. The glue stick is of high purity, has no impurities, and will not produce bubbles

【Wide Application】Widely used in creating arts, holiday crafts, decorations, home, office, school DIY and toys, including paper, wood, cardboard, foam, string, metal, textile, glass, and various plastics and more
